subcodes.first_line: O thou whose name is adorned through association with the Most Great Name! My Lord and my hope! This servant hath turned unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تزین اسمه انتسابا الی الاسم الاعظم رب و رجائی ان عبدک هذا اقبل الیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
